summary: Critical blockers: fixture files (basic_matrix.json, matrix_with_excludes.json, etc.) referenced in workflow steps are not provided—workflow cannot execute. No act-result.txt artifact created (requirement violation). No actionlint validation shown or proof of successful act execution. TDD methodology not evident (no failing test-first). Python script is well-designed (type hints, error handling, modular), but deliverable is incomplete and non-functional.
